skills.name: anthropics/skills
skills.description_en: Anthropic's official skills repository. Production-grade skills, all Apache 2.0 licensed. Powers Claude's built-in document capabilities.
skills.description_tr: Anthropic'in resmi skill repository'si. Prodüksiyon kalitesinde skill'ler, Apache 2.0 lisanslı.

skills.name: ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills
skills.description_en: Mega collection of skills. Mostly API integration skills for services like Slack, GitHub, Jira, Salesforce.
skills.description_tr: Mega skill koleksiyonu. Slack, GitHub, Jira, Salesforce gibi servislere API entegrasyonları.

skills.name: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
skills.description_en: Hundreds of skills: engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, finance. Works with Claude Code + Codex + Gemini CLI.
skills.description_tr: Yüzlerce skill: engineering, marketing, product, compliance. Claude Code + Codex + Gemini CLI ile uyumlu.

skills.name: pdf
skills.description_en: Work with PDF files: read, merge, split, rotate, watermark, fill forms, OCR, encrypt. For both extracting data and creating new PDFs from scratch.
skills.description_tr: PDF dosyalarıyla çalışmak: okuma, birleştirme, bölme, sayfa döndürme, watermark, form doldurma, OCR, şifreleme.

skills.name: xlsx
skills.description_en: Create and edit Excel/CSV/TSV files. Formulas, charts, data transformations, cleaning messy tabular data.
skills.description_tr: Excel/CSV/TSV dosyaları oluşturma ve düzenleme. Formüller, grafikler, veri dönüşümleri.

skills.name: docx
skills.description_en: Create and edit Word documents with tracked changes, comments, formatting, table of contents, letterheads.
skills.description_tr: Word belgeleri oluşturma/düzenleme. Tracked changes, yorumlar, biçimlendirme, içindekiler tablosu.

skills.name: pptx
skills.description_en: Create and edit PowerPoint presentations. Slide layouts, templates, speaker notes.
skills.description_tr: PowerPoint sunumları oluşturma ve düzenleme. Slayt düzenleri, şablonlar, konuşmacı notları.

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description_en: Production-grade frontend interfaces that avoid generic 'AI aesthetics'. Generates creative, polished code for web components, landing pages, dashboards, React components.
skills.description_tr: Üretim kalitesinde, jenerik 'AI estetiği'nden uzak frontend arayüzleri.

skills.name: canvas-design
skills.description_en: Visual design outputs (PNG/PDF). Posters, social media graphics, cover designs. Typography and composition focused.
skills.description_tr: Görsel tasarım çıktıları (PNG/PDF). Poster, sosyal medya görseli, kapak tasarımı.

skills.name: web-artifacts-builder
skills.description_en: Build multi-component, interactive web artifacts using React + Tailwind + shadcn/ui.
skills.description_tr: React + Tailwind + shadcn/ui kullanarak çok bileşenli, etkileşimli web artifact'ları oluşturma.

skills.name: webapp-testing
skills.description_en: Test local web applications using Playwright. E2E tests, interaction simulation, screenshot validation.
skills.description_tr: Playwright kullanarak yerel web uygulamalarını test etme. E2E testler, etkileşim simülasyonu.

skills.name: claude-api
skills.description_en: Build and debug apps with the Claude API and Anthropic SDK. Reference for advanced features like tool use, batch processing, streaming.
skills.description_tr: Claude API ve Anthropic SDK'sı ile uygulama geliştirme. Tool use, batch processing, streaming.

skills.name: mcp-builder
skills.description_en: Guide for creating Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. For writing integration layers that connect Claude to external services.
skills.description_tr: Model Context Protocol (MCP) sunucusu oluşturma rehberi.

skills.name: algorithmic-art
skills.description_en: Generate generative/algorithmic art with p5.js. Mathematical patterns, particle systems, generative visual compositions.
skills.description_tr: p5.js ile generatif/algoritmik sanat üretme. Matematiksel desenler, parçacık sistemleri.

skills.name: brand-guidelines
skills.description_en: Generate content and visuals that apply Anthropic's brand identity (color, typography, tone of voice).
skills.description_tr: Anthropic marka kimliğini uygulayan içerik ve görsel üretme.

skills.name: theme-factory
skills.description_en: Apply 10 preset themes or create custom ones for slides, documents, and HTML outputs.
skills.description_tr: Slayt, doküman ve HTML çıktıları için 10 hazır tema veya özel tema oluşturma.

skills.name: internal-comms
skills.description_en: Write internal company communications: status reports, newsletters, all-hands presentations, performance reviews.
skills.description_tr: Şirket içi iletişim yazımı: durum raporları, bültenler, all-hands sunumları.

skills.name: doc-coauthoring
skills.description_en: Structured collaborative documentation writing flow. For PRDs, technical design docs, RFCs.
skills.description_tr: Yapılandırılmış ortak dokümantasyon yazma akışı. PRD'ler, teknik tasarım dokümanları, RFC'ler.

skills.name: slack-gif-creator
skills.description_en: Generate Slack-optimized animated GIFs with small file sizes.
skills.description_tr: Slack için optimize edilmiş, dosya boyutu küçük animasyonlu GIF üretme.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description_en: Create new Claude skills, optimize existing skills, run performance evaluations (evals).
skills.description_tr: Yeni Claude skill'leri oluşturma, mevcut skill'leri optimize etme.

skills.name: travisvn/awesome-claude-skills
skills.description_en: Curated list of skills and Claude AI workflow resources. Particularly Claude Code focused.
skills.description_tr: Özenle derlenmiş skill listesi ve Claude AI workflow kaynakları.

skills.name: lsp
skills.description_en: Language Server Protocol (LSP) implementation for atopile based on pygls. Reference for custom language tooling developers.
skills.description_tr: atopile için pygls tabanlı Language Server Protocol (LSP) implementasyonu.

skills.name: debug-that
skills.description_en: AI-first debug CLI for Node, TypeScript, Bun, Python, C++ and Rust. Stack trace analysis, breakpoint management.
skills.description_tr: Node, TypeScript, Bun, Python, C++ ve Rust için AI-first debug CLI.

skills.name: worktree-manager
skills.description_en: Create, manage, and clean up Git worktrees. For working with parallel feature branches on the same repo.
skills.description_tr: Git worktree oluşturma, yönetme ve temizleme.

skills.name: changelog-generator
skills.description_en: Generate customer-facing changelogs from git commits. Conventional commits support, category-based grouping.
skills.description_tr: Git commit'lerden müşteri odaklı changelog üretimi.

skills.name: competitive-ads-extractor
skills.description_en: Competitive analysis from Facebook and LinkedIn ad libraries. Active campaign detection, messaging strategy extraction.
skills.description_tr: Facebook ve LinkedIn reklam kütüphanelerinden rakip analizi.
